title: CO-TOP Sintered Stone
description: CO-TOP sintered stone section with hero image and cards.

title.default:
The New Standard
in Luxury Surfaces

body.default: Ultra-compact sintered stone is produced at extreme heat and pressure — virtually impervious to heat, UV, staining, and scratching indoors and outdoors.

default.label: Sintered Stone
default.name: Mica — Kitchen
default.body: Withstands direct heat from pots and pans. The go-to for modern open-plan kitchens.

default.label: Sintered Stone
default.name: Mica — Bathroom
default.body: Moisture-proof and UV-stable — seamless, grout-free vanity surfaces with minimal upkeep.

default.label: Sintered Stone
default.name: Mica — Outdoor
default.body: UV and frost resistant. Ideal for alfresco dining surfaces, terraces, and pool surrounds.
